## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings (`./gradlew build`)

- [ ] Static analysis passes (Checkstyle, PMD, SpotBugs)
- [ ] Code coverage meets minimum thresholds (70% line, 50% branch)
- [ ] No new SonarQube issues introduced
